title: CLAUDE.md as Fourth Memory-Distribution Surface — Arc Parent
description: Extends the proven skill-deploy 3-surface pattern (SR canonical -> BT sync tool -> delivery surfaces) with a 4th surface: a generated repo-root CLAUDE.md projecting the CLI-actionable subset of canonical rule instances + skill triggers into Claude Code's only readable substrate, since Code has no path to account-level Memory.

outputs.description: Arc parent instance lands on SR main, establishing the BT-before-EB dependency order for its two children
acceptanceCriteria: Instance validates via ajv canonical 3-flag against deliverable.schema.json v1.2.0
childDeliverables[] contains exactly d-2026-07-02-bt-skill-sync-claude-md-mode and d-2026-07-02-eb-claude-md-landing
notes field states BT-before-EB sequencing rationale

preMerge: ajv canonical 3-flag PASS against deliverable.schema.json v1.2.0
childDeliverables ids match child spec ids exactly once both are authored

transitions.trigger: L4 correction: false-choice menu rejected, full-stack scope confirmed
CLI substrate catch: SPEC.md-as-deliverable-record anti-pattern + redundant OUT-1 removed; scope.repo corrected from EB to SR (parent has no EB execution, only self-landing)

notes: Sequencing is load-bearing, not arbitrary: BT child must land first because it builds the generate-claude-md mode; EB child consumes that mode's output. Reversing the order produces nothing to land.
